subject: Re: Missing information in optics.star file Warp to Relion 4.0.1
body:
Hi Felix,
You’ll need
_rlnVoltage #6
_rlnSphericalAberration #7
_rlnAmplitudeContrast #9
And the corresponding columns with the data (300, 2.7, 0.07)
Best,
Philipp.
Sent from my iPhone
On Jun 13, 2023, at 10:50 AM, Felix Lange <felix.lange.le@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi guys,
I am following the tt tutorial for the Warp-Dynamo-Relion pipeline with my own data. I extracted subtomograms in Warp at 5Apx according to the settings given in the tutorial. Now in Relion, the _optics.star is missing entries for the optics causing an error in Relion. The entry now looks like this:
data_optics
loop_ 
_rlnOpticsGroup #1 
_rlnOpticsGroupName #2 
_rlnImagePixelSize #3 
_rlnImageSize #4 
_rlnImageDimensionality #5 
           1 opticsGroup1     5.000000           60            3
How cann I pass along the missing information? Thanks and all the best,
Felix 




--
